name: Garlic Chicken Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 cup boned and skinned chicken breast halves, cooked and diced
recipeInstructions:
use store bought or homemade (see recipe) your choice.
Mix together cream cheese, sour cream and mashed garlic until smooth. Spread the mixture on the pizza crust, top with chicken, onion, tomato, mushrooms, and cheese. Bake in a 350°F oven for 15 minutes or until the crust is done and the cheese is melted. Top with parmesan cheese.
Note: The oven temperature should be specified as 350°F (175°C) for clarity.
